column1: # Sprint 20 — OWASP ZAP rule overrides for Concord baseline scan.
# Concord-specific tunings: some default ZAP rules are noisy or
# don't apply to our architecture. Anything not listed uses ZAP's

column3: # Permission Policy Header — partially covered by helmet (warn not fail)
# CSP — covered by helmet but we still want WARN-tier visibility
# Information Disclosure - Suspicious Comments — too noisy on dev/debug paths
# Storable & Cacheable Content — many endpoints intentionally cache-friendly
# Permissions Policy Header Not Set — covered by helmet
# Insufficient Site Isolation Against Spectre Vulnerability — needs cross-origin policy follow-on
# Server Leaks Information via X-Powered-By — Express default, we strip in prod
